ARS.note: WC26 heat-map: 11 confirmed reps — Saliba (FRA CB), Hincapié (ECU CB · #5), Gabriel Magalhães (BRA CB), Saka (ENG winger), Ødegaard (NOR captain), Eze (ENG · joined 25/26 from CRY), Martinelli (BRA · BRA bench), Trossard (BEL), Havertz (GER · 2 goals v CUW), Rice (ENG), Gyökeres (SWE · joined 25/26). Jurriën Timber (NED) WITHDREW from WC26 with groin injury (doesn't add to load). Gabriel Jesus (BRA) status TBC due to injury concerns. 11 reps = 2nd heaviest in PL behind MCI (17) — Arteta opener prep significantly compounded by WC fatigue across spine of team. 0.85× discount appropriate (down from 1.0×). · ✅ PL Official Jul 4: Reiss Nelson RETURNS from BRE loan (winger depth · loan-return not signing) · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 10: Illan Meslier IN free from Leeds — deep backup (played 0 mins at Leeds 25/26) · behind Raya · negligible FPL · 🚨 OFICIAL Jul 14: Leandro Trossard OUT→Beşiktaş. Minutes-check: 1997 mins/21 starts 25/26 (genuine rotation winger, ~58% mins) → real ARS departure, frees attacking minutes (Eze/Martinelli/Madueke/Saka benefit). Trossard now OFF the ARS heat-map. · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 16: Karl Hein OUT→Werder Bremen (GK · 0 mins 25/26, 3rd choice) → zero FPL. · ✅ CONFIRMED (backlog-swept Jul 18): Jakub KIWIOR OUT (0 mins 25/26) + large academy release batch (Chapman, Nichols, Ferdinand, Dudziak et al · all 0 mins) → zero FPL impact. · ⏳ LIKELY (NOT OFFICIAL) Jul 18: Christos TZOLIS from Club Brugge, €40m (🇬🇷 24yo LEFT WINGER). Source: Ornstein/The Athletic — "agreement reached, in process of being finalised"; maisfutebol headline is "a caminho do" NOT OFICIAL → LIKELY tier, do NOT treat as done. Minutes-check: 0 PL mins, NOT in FPL DB — his 22G+29A in 52 games was BELGIAN PRO LEAGUE, discount heavily; Norwich spell was Championship. CONTEXT: direct TROSSARD REPLACEMENT (sold to Beşiktaş Jul 14, 1997 mins/21 starts). ⚠️ WIDE AREAS CROWDED: Saka (2218/25), Eze (1885/22), Madueke (1205/16), Martinelli (1065/11) — Tzolis would be 4th-5th in that queue. Do NOT buy on fee or Belgian numbers; wait for pre-season xMin. · 📌 DETAIL Jul 18 (maisfutebol OFICIAL): Trossard signed at Beşiktaş for THREE seasons + one option — permanent, no return route. Confirms the wide vacancy is structural, which is what the ⏳LIKELY Tzolis (€40m) move is meant to fill. · 🏆 WC26 FINAL RESOLVED Jul 19: Spain champions (beat Argentina 1-0), England 3rd, France 4th. FATIGUE TIERING for 26/27 openers: the DEEPER a nation ran, the later/more-fatigued its PL players return. HEAVIEST: France + England players (played the 3rd-place game Jul 18 too — the LATEST possible finish). Spain + Argentina (final Jul 19) also max load. Apply the tightest opening-GW discount (0.75×) to PL players from ESP/ARG/FRA/ENG who went the distance. · 📋 LIKELY Jul 20 (FPL deleted graphic): Myles Lewis-Skelly reclassified DEF → MID for 26/27. Slight NEGATIVE — ARS clean sheets are premium and MID loses them (+4→+1); barely played 25/26 (5 starts). Only good if he becomes a genuinely attacking starter. · 🚨 INJURY Jul 22 (Arsenal official): William SALIBA — BACK injury, surgery NOT recommended but managed recovery, "out for an EXTENDED PERIOD." FPL: AVOID at season start (no return date). 🔻 KNOCK-ON to the ARS defence template: Gabriel (now £8.0m premium DEF, topped defenders 209 pts) is TEMPERED for the opener — loses his best CB partner (Saliba) → ARS CS less bankable, + heavy WC fatigue (BRA deep run), + minor CBI/BPS nick. Likely Gabriel partner: Hincapié (20 st) or Calafiori (22 st). FADE ARS defensive assets for opening GWs. (26/27 prices confirmed: Gabriel £8.0m, +£2.0m.) · 🎯 VALUE FROM SALIBA INJURY Jul 22 (LetsTalkFPL/Andy): Cristhian MOSQUERA steps into the open CB spot next to Gabriel → cheap CB enabler. Young highly-rated signing (986 mins/9 starts, first ARS season); price will be CHEAP (~4.5-5.0m TBC, NOT £8.0m like Gabriel); likely FRESH (not a WC starter); soft ARS early fixtures (Cov H/Sun a/Leeds H) = CS upside. = GW1-STARTER BUDGET-DEF CANDIDATE (cheap + nailed-by-circumstance + good fixtures). CAVEATS: (1) partner might be HINCAPIÉ (20 starts) not Mosquera — watch pre-season for who plays right-CB next to Gabriel; (2) an ARS CB signing to cover Saliba would blow up his minutes. Confirm on price reveal + pre-season XI. · 🧤 RAYA = SET-AND-FORGET GK ALL SEASON (user conviction, Jul 22): was the #1 GK 25/26 — 162 pts (+19 clear of the field), 19 CS in 37 st (51%, best in league), nailed. FRESH for GW1 (ESP WC backup behind Simón — barely played, no fatigue). £6.2 last season. The rare GK where paying up is CORRECT (his CS volume is an outlier — cheap-GK-parity logic fails only against him). PAIRS with Mosquera = ARS CS double-up (each shutout pays GK+DEF), both fresh, both on soft Cov/Sun/Leeds opener. Saliba-out = mild CS headwind, not a dealbreaker. · ✅ Christos TZOLIS IN CONFIRMED (€40M ← Club Brugge, Greek winger, biggest-ever Belgian-league sale) — maisfutebol OFICIAL Jul 23 (was rumour). NOT in FPL DB yet. FPL: NOT a GW1 pick — lands in a stacked/rotating ARS attack (Saka owns RW; Eze/Ødegaard/Madueke/Martinelli scrum for the rest), new signing, THIN PL sample ("returns to PL"=ex-Norwich, relegated; Brugge form good but a level down). GW4+ monitor ONLY IF he wins LW (Martinelli declining 11st = the crack). ZERO impact on our Raya/Mosquera (defensive picks). REINFORCES: ARS attack is an un-ownable rotation minefield (8+ options) → the CLEAN ARS play is the Raya+Mosquera CS route, not guessing a winger. · Bruno Guimarães 🔴 RUMOUR (Romano £70m bid to follow, NEW expect to reject). No impact on our Raya/Mosquera (GK/CB) even if done; ARS midfield already elite (Rice+Zubimendi nailed) so marginal CS gain negligible. · 🚨🚨 MOSQUERA PICK BROKEN (Sky ✓ Jul 23: ARS pursuing Ezri KONSA + free agent John STONES amid Saliba injury; Timber AND Ben White returning to fitness). DEPTH CHART REALITY: Gabriel 30st/209pt > Saliba 30st (inj) > TIMBER 28st/149 (returning) > CALAFIORI 22st/109 > HINCAPIÉ 20st/87 > MOSQUERA 9st/40 ← 6TH IN QUEUE. Saliba out promotes Timber/Calafiori/Hincapié, NOT Mosquera. + a Konsa/Stones signing buries him further. 13.3% owned = widespread trap. 📌 MY ERROR: built the pick on a narrative ("injury opens a spot") when 9 starts = FRINGE by our own xMin thresholds — I even quoted 986 mins at the time. ⇒ ACTION: DROP Mosquera. Recommended replacement van Hecke (TOT £5.0, 36st, 148pts, best GW1-3 FDR 8, £55m=nailed, frees £0.5); alt Milenković (NFO £5.5, 37st, Glasner back-3 guarantees 3 CB spots). · 📌 WINDOW PATTERN (Jul 23): ARS investing across EVERY line — Tzolis IN (€40m, done) + Konsa/Stones targeted at CB + Bruno Guimarães £70m planned. ⇒ the ARS squad is getting MORE crowded, not less. THIS is why RAYA is the only safe Arsenal pick: a nailed GK is immune to squad crowding, while every outfield spot gets more contested. Same force that broke the Mosquera pick. · 🚨 CORRECTION TO MY MOSQUERA REASONING (user caught it Jul 23): I ranked ALL ARS defenders by minutes and called Mosquera "6th in the queue" — WRONG. FPL has only GK/DEF/MID/FWD, and real position matters ONLY for judging whether a player STARTS. Timber (28 st) plays RB and Calafiori (22 st) LB — they do NOT compete with a centre-back. With Saliba out the actual contest for the CB slot beside Gabriel is MOSQUERA vs HINCAPIE (+White as cover) = a 1-in-3 shot, NOT 1-in-6. Materially better odds than I represented, which is why 5 creators hold him. WHAT SURVIVES: the Konsa/Stones signing risk (Sky) is INDEPENDENT of position logic and would bury whoever wins the slot. Our van Hecke pick stands on its own merits (36 st, 148 pts, £0.5 cheaper, nailed by a £55m fee) = we bought CERTAINTY, not a better lottery ticket. 📌 LESSON: when judging if a player starts, compare him ONLY to players competing for HIS position — never rank a whole positional group as one queue.

AVL.name: Aston Villa

STAKES (minutes-verified): Rogers = 3280 mins/37 starts, 10G+8A, 169 pts = AVL top scorer (ahead of Watkins 167). AVL IMPACT if completed: lose best FPL asset; attack becomes Watkins-dependent (next creators McGinn 103, Buendia 102). Downgrade AVL attacking assets pending outcome. · ✅ CONFIRMED Jul 17 (PL Official + maisfutebol OFICIAL + Romano) — LOGGED LATE Jul 18: Johan Manzambi IN from SC Freiburg, ~€60m (🇨🇭 MID). Minutes-check: 0 PL mins (Bundesliga) → NO PL sample, role is projection. €60m = intended starter. ⚠️ Starred at WC26 for Switzerland (QF run) → HEAVY WC load + delayed pre-season, will miss early friendlies. CONTEXT: pairs with the ⏳LIKELY Rogers→CHE exit (£117m) — Manzambi looks like the Rogers replacement, so AVL midfield is being rebuilt, not just reinforced. Fade AVL midfield assets in opening GWs until the new shape settles. · ✅ CONFIRMED (backlog-swept Jul 18): Youri TIELEMANS OUT → Man Utd (£35m release clause, AVL had no say). 🚨 AVL MIDFIELD BEING GUTTED: Tielemans OUT (confirmed) + Rogers ⏳LIKELY OUT (£117m CHE) vs only Manzambi IN (€60m). If Rogers goes, Villa lose their top scorer (169 pts) AND a 21-start midfielder in one window. Heavy downgrade on ALL AVL midfield assets until the new shape is proven. · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 18 (PL Official + maisfutebol + Romano): Yeimar MOSQUERA OUT → Vitória Guimarães, permanent, AVL retain sell-on clause (COL U20 int, deal to 2030). Minutes-check: 0 PL mins (not in FPL DB) → prospect sale, ZERO FPL impact. ⚠️ NAME TRAP: three Mosqueras in play — Yeimar (this one, 0 mins) vs Cristhian Mosquera (Arsenal, 986/9) vs Yerson Mosquera (Wolves, 2137/24). Do not conflate. · ✅ CLUB-CONFIRMED Jul 18 (@AVFCOfficial): Andrés GARCÍA → GETAFE, season-long loan (23yo RB, Levante academy). Minutes-check: 83 PL mins / 1 start — club cite "8 appearances all competitions" but PL footprint is ONE start, i.e. fringe. ZERO FPL impact: Matty Cash nailed at RB (3016 mins/34 starts). 📌 NOTE: AVL DEFENCE IS THE INTACT UNIT — Konsa (3035/34), Cash (3016/34), Digne (1842/21), Pau Torres, Maatsen, Mings all staying. Contrast with the midfield being dismantled (Tielemans out, Rogers ⏳likely out). So AVL defensive assets are NOT part of the midfield fade — they may even gain if Villa sit deeper. · ⏳ LIKELY (NOT OFFICIAL) Jul 18: João GOMES from Wolverhampton, €40m + €5m add-ons (£38m package). Source: Romano HERE-WE-GO — verbal agreement, Wolves accepted, medical authorised, player left training to travel. Per tier policy Romano ≠ official → LIKELY until club statement. 🔑 KEY DIFFERENCE: unlike every other AVL/PL arrival this window, Gomes is PL-PROVEN — 2829 mins/32 starts for Wolves 25/26 (nailed), and he STAYS in the PL (Wolves relegated → Villa). Profile: defensive MID, 1G+2A, 107 pts, 5.3 — a SQUAD upgrade, not an FPL points asset. REVISED AVL MIDFIELD READ: less gutted than first assessed — McGinn (2136/28), Onana (1755/21), Buendía (1753/21), Kamara (1410/17) all remain; Gomes adds proven PL minutes. Creativity still the hole if Rogers (169 pts) departs. Keep the fade on AVL midfield ATTACKING assets, but the unit itself is being rebuilt with at least one proven piece. · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 18 (V. Guimarães announced): Oliwier ZYCH (22yo POL GK) LOANED OUT → Vitória Guimarães. Minutes-check: not in FPL DB, 0 PL mins → ZERO FPL impact. Guimarães today (Mosquera permanent + Zych loan) — emerging loan-partner relationship worth noting for future fringe exits. · ⏳ LIKELY (NOT OFFICIAL) Jul 18 — ESCALATED from the Jul 15 rumour I declined to log: Lucas DIGNE → PSG. Tier = LIKELY (Romano ≠ official). 🚨 CORRECTION: I earlier wrote "AVL DEFENCE IS THE INTACT UNIT" — that no longer holds. Digne = 1842 mins/21 starts, a genuine starting LB. 🎯 FPL ANGLE: Digne and MAATSEN (1590/17) were splitting left-back 21-v-17. If Digne goes, MAATSEN inherits a nailed LB role in an otherwise settled defence (Konsa 3035/34, Cash 3016/34 untouched) → Maatsen becomes a real cheap-defender watch for 26/27. Track in pre-season. · 🏆 WC26 FINAL RESOLVED Jul 19: Spain champions (beat Argentina 1-0), England 3rd, France 4th. FATIGUE TIERING for 26/27 openers: the DEEPER a nation ran, the later/more-fatigued its PL players return. HEAVIEST: France + England players (played the 3rd-place game Jul 18 too — the LATEST possible finish). Spain + Argentina (final Jul 19) also max load. Apply the tightest opening-GW discount (0.75×) to PL players from ESP/ARG/FRA/ENG who went the distance. · ✅ CONFIRMED Jul 19 (maisfutebol OFICIAL, "assina em definitivo"): João GOMES signed PERMANENTLY from Wolverhampton, up to €44.7m — UPGRADES the Jul 18 ⏳LIKELY entry. He is the ONLY PL-proven signing of Villa's midfield rebuild (2829 mins/32 starts at Wolves 25/26; stays in PL as Wolves relegated). Profile: defensive MID, 1G+2A, 5.3 — squad steel, not an FPL points asset. AVL midfield now: Tielemans OUT ✅, Rogers ⏳ still likely OUT (£117m CHE), Gomes IN ✅ + Manzambi IN ✅. Fade AVL midfield ATTACKING assets; Gomes himself is a defensive add. · 📋 CONFIRMED Jul 20: Lamare Bogarde DEF → MID (young, 11 starts/40 pts — minor, loses CS floor; not FPL-relevant yet). · 📋 PRE-SEASON Jul 21 (v Walsall, youth-heavy XI, 5-0, all goals academy = noise): Maatsen STARTED at LB (mild positive for the Digne→PSG-beneficiary angle, but weak evidence in a fringe XI — want him starting a STRONG XI w/ Digne absent to confirm). João Gomes (new signing) on the bench = integrated/training. Senior core (Watkins/McGinn/Onana/Konsa/Pau Torres/E.Martínez) absent on WC break. · ✅ CONFIRMED Jul 21: Morgan ROGERS OUT → Chelsea, £117m — the domino resolves. Villa LOSE their best FPL asset (169 pts, top scorer) + a 37-start creator. Combined with Tielemans OUT ✅, Villa MIDFIELD/ATTACK REBUILD IS NOW DEFINITIVE: turned a 169-pt creator into João Gomes (defensive steel) + Manzambi (€60m, 0 PL mins). AVL ATTACKING FADE CONFIRMED (no longer conditional) — downgrade all Villa attacking/creative assets for 26/27 until the new shape proves itself. Defence + GK still intact (Konsa/Cash/Pau Torres/E.Martínez untouched). · ⏳ LIKELY (Ornstein, advanced talks — NOT done) Jul 21: Alejandro GARNACHO from Chelsea, LOAN + conditional buy obligation; Emery driving it (wanted him before). SOFTENS the Villa attacking fade but does NOT lift it: Garnacho was a ROTATION player at Chelsea (14 starts/1261 mins/56 pts/1G+4A 25/26) — talented but streaky, unproven as an FPL producer, nothing like Rogers (169). Emery wanting him = likely MORE minutes than at CHE → breakout CHANCE, not a lock. WATKINS (167 pts) UNTOUCHED = remains the AVL attacking asset to own. Garnacho = WATCH for a nailed role + actual output, not a buy. (Ornstein: unrelated to Rogers, but note the CHE-AVL axis + Villa reinvesting Rogers money into attack: Garnacho + Manzambi.) · (corrob. Romano Jul 21: Emery approved Garnacho as TOP target, negotiations underway w/ Chelsea — firms the MINUTES gate: a manager's top target usually starts. OUTPUT gate unchanged — still the real question. Tier still ⏳ not done.) · (Garnacho firming Jul 22, Romano: buy-obligation clause considered EASY TO REACH → effectively a permanent deal, not just a loan. Still ⏳ not announced, but the OUTPUT gate remains the only real question.) · ⏳ HWG Jul 22 (Romano): Garnacho→Villa AGREEMENT DONE, loan + buy obligation (mandatory under conditions), medical BOOKED. Firmest LIKELY — flips to ✅ on club announcement. MINUTES gate now essentially CLOSED (Emery wanted him + deal done → starts). OUTPUT gate = the whole question. ⚠️ DON'T be fooled by "8 goals/43 games" in reports — that is ALL-COMPS; his PREMIER LEAGUE output was 1G+4A in 14 starts (the FPL number). The 8 came in cups/Europe = reinforces the streaky-in-the-league read. VERDICT: watch for output, not a buy; Watkins remains the AVL attacker to own. · ✅ GARNACHO NOW CONFIRMED (loan from Chelsea + buy obligation mandatory-under-conditions) — PL Official + maisfutebol OFICIAL Jul 23 (was HWG). Season-long, Emery-driven. FPL verdict UNCHANGED: avoid/non-factor (not nailed, 1G+4A PL output, 2.3 ppm, new club, poss ARG WC fatigue); Watkins untouched as THE AVL pick (167 pts vs field <103). · 🚨 WATKINS = SEMI-FINALIST RISK (Andy Martin Jul 23: ENG/FRA/ARG/ESP players not back at clubs until ~AUG 10, i.e. 11 days before the GW1 deadline). Watkins WAS in the England 26-man squad and ENGLAND REACHED THE SEMIS (3rd). Villa have NO alternative striker (Abraham 2 st) so he WILL start if fit — risk is SHARPNESS not selection. ⇒ RECOMMEND Watkins £8.0 → IGOR THIAGO (BRE £8.0): Brazil exited at the QF (a round earlier = earlier return, passes the semi-final filter), and better on output — 37 st/22 G/181 pts/PENALTIES 1st vs Watkins 33/16/167/pens 2nd, plus better FDR (8 v 9). Caveats: Thiago still carries 0.85x WC discount (fresher, not fresh); creates a 2nd internal hedge (Thiago BRE v van Hecke TOT in GW1).

BOU finished 6th in 25/26 (best-ever · first European qualification) — adds fixture load. WC26 reps: 5 confirmed — Tyler Adams (USA CDM · 90min v PAR + yellow), Ben Gannon Doak (SCO RW · £25m Aug 2025 · 75min v HAI), Ryan Christie (SCO MID · 3-yr ext Jun 13 · 15min v HAI), Rayan Vitor (BRA FWD · #37 from Vasco · BRA bench v MOR unused), Bafodé Diakité (CIV CB · BOU #18 prev Lille · CIV bench v ECU tonight). Heavy WC load + manager + European-cup fixture compound. 0.8× holds. · 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 Christie + Gannon-Doak (SCO) back early · -2 fatigue (biggest single-club SCO benefit) · ✅ PL Official: Romain Faivre OUT to Auxerre (fringe · non-PL · negligible FPL) · ✅ PL Official Jul 10: Luis Sinisterra OUT to Cruzeiro (played 0 mins 25/26 · injured all yr · negligible) · 🚨 PL Official Jul 11: Marcos Senesi OUT (free) → TOTTENHAM (nailed #1 CB · 37 starts/6A/£5.2) — BIG defensive loss for BOU · weakens their CS · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 13: Owen Bevan OUT→Dundee (permanent) + Alex Paulsen OUT→Motherwell (loan). Minutes-check: both 0 mins / 0 starts 25/26 (fringe CB + backup GK) → ZERO FPL impact, squad-depth clear-out only. · ✅ OFICIAL Jul 18: Álvaro Rodríguez IN from Elche (FWD). No PL history → unproven at this level, role TBC pre-season; wait for xMin before considering. · ✅ CONFIRMED (backlog-swept Jul 18): Hamed Traoré OUT (634/9) · Alex Jiménez loan-out [see CORRECTION below] · Dacosta Gonzalez OUT → minimal FPL. · 🚨 CORRECTION Jul 18 — I understated this in the backlog sweep. Álex JIMÉNEZ (ESP full-back) loaned to FIORENTINA for the season, salary covered + €20m BUY OPTION (PL Official + maisfutebol OFICIAL + Romano). Minutes-check: 2315 mins / 26 STARTS 25/26 = a genuine REGULAR, not fringe — I filed him as "minimal FPL", which was wrong. BOU lose a nailed full-back for the whole season, and the €20m option means he may not return at all. Real downgrade to BOU defensive depth; re-check their FB situation in pre-season. ⚠️ NAME TRAP: not Raúl Jiménez (FUL striker, 2183/27, released Jul 10 — different player). · ✅ CLUB-CONFIRMED Jul 18 (@afcbournemouth, "first summer signing"): Álvaro RODRÍGUEZ from Elche, £21m / €25m (22yo 🇺🇾 FWD, Girona + Real Madrid academy, ESP & URU youth caps). Production: 7G + 5A in 36 games last season — LA LIGA, modest for a striker (~1 goal per 5 games), discount for the step up. Minutes-check: 0 PL mins, no PL sample. ⚠️ PATH TO MINUTES CONTESTED: Evanilson (2741/32, 6G) and especially KROUPI (1663 mins/21 starts, 13 GOALS — best strike rate at the club) are both ahead. A £21m development signing, NOT a plug-and-play starter. No FPL interest until pre-season shows he is displacing Kroupi/Evanilson. · 🎯 ⏳ LIKELY (FPL own graphic, since DELETED — pending re-confirmation) Jul 20: Junior KROUPI reclassified FWD → MID for 26/27. HUGE value event if confirmed: 25/26 = 13 goals/113 pts/4.7 as a FWD in only 21 starts (0.70 g/90). As a MID each goal is +5 not +4 (+13 retro) + CS bonus → ~127 equiv. If priced cheap + nails ~30 starts = 150+ pt MID at budget price = template-tier. GATES: (1) reclassification from a DELETED tweet, not locked; (2) minutes not his yet — Evanilson 32 starts ahead + Álvaro Rodríguez (£21m) signed, though as a MID he could coexist with a striker. TOP pre-season watch — track his friendly minutes + confirm the position change + await price. · ✅ CONFIRMED Jul 20 (full FPL position-change list published): Kroupi FWD→MID is OFFICIAL — upgrades the earlier ⏳. The value case stands (13 goals now at MID scoring). Gates remain: minutes (Evanilson 32 st ahead + Álvaro Rodríguez signed) + his 26/27 price. #1 pre-season watch. · ⏳ LIKELY (NOT OFFICIAL) Jul 20: António SILVA from Benfica (🇵🇹 CB, Portugal int). Source: Ben Jacobs — personal terms AGREED, club talks advanced, "muito perto" — but Benfica want to delay until AFTER their Europa League play-off vs St. Gallen, so TIMING GATE (could drag). PROVEN abroad (Benfica starter, 41 games 25/26, 1G+1A) — NOT unproven, but 0 PL sample so adaptation unknown. FILLS A REAL HOLE: BOU lost Senesi (37 starts → Spurs) + Jiménez (26 starts → Fiorentina loan), leaving Hill/Diakité/Milosavljevic as thin CB cover. If it lands he likely STARTS. FPL: nailed cheap CB candidate, but BOU are mid-CS + pure CBs get marginally less bonus under 26/27 BPS → moderate budget-defender value, not premium. Watch: does the deal clear the EL-play-off gate + pre-season minutes. · 🚨 SCOUTING CORRECTION Jul 20 (user, knows him well): António Silva is ERROR-PRONE and DECLINING, not the reliable CB the CV implies. Concrete: lost the ball → penalty foul on Gyökeres in the last minute of a Portuguese Cup final vs Sporting (~2yr ago), 1-1, Benfica lost in ET; multiple other defensive errors; DROPPED from Portugal starting XI; losing relevance at both Benfica AND Portugal — trajectory is DOWN, not up. FPL verdict FLIPS: even if the move completes and he starts, he is a FADE/AVOID — error-prone CBs leak negative events (OGs, conceded pens, cards) and he lands in a mid-CS, rebuilding BOU back line = worst combo (few CS + negative risk). I over-weighted "proven abroad"; the name ≠ current quality. · 📈 Jul 21: 🚨 CORRECTION — the "~85% owned" from LetsTalkFPL is an ASSUMPTION/PROJECTION, NOT confirmed data (FPL 26/27 game not at real-ownership stage yet · flagged by user). What holds regardless of %: Kroupi is SHAPING UP as a heavily-anticipated template pick after the FWD→MID reclass — validates the early flag from the Álvaro Rodríguez signing + confirms he was priced cheap). STRATEGIC PIVOT: the edge is now PRICED IN — IF he ends up heavily owned he becomes a wash (own for cover); but real ownership is TBC until the game launches — do not quantify yet. FADE CASE (Andy/LetsTalkFPL): rests on the unresolved MINUTES gate — he started only 21/38 last year, Evanilson (32 st) + Álvaro Rodríguez (£21m) compete. 85% is heavy faith in an UNCONFIRMED starting role. RESOLVER: pre-season lineups — does he start BOU strong XIs? If yes, 85% justified (own as cover); if rotated, the ~15% fade wins.
